**2. [Seven More Sentenced to Five Years in Prison in October 4 Case](https://civil.ge/archives/740754)**

来源：Civil Georgia | 2026-06-19 10:53
标签：政治, 科技

摘要：Seven people tried over the October 4, 2025, election-day unrest in Tbilisi, including 72-year-old doctor Giorgi Chakhunashvili, were sentenced to five years in prison on June 19. The convicted are Giorgi Chakhunashvili, Davit Zhghenti, Konstantine Kokaia, Kakhaber Mzhavanadze, Zakro Albutashvili, Davit Sturua, and Ia Darakhvelidze. Among them, two had been free on bail, including Chakhunashvili, &#8230;
